doc: Human-reviewed exact-id crosswalk: WA PDC person_id -> OpenStates ocd-person
(docs/TRUSTED-EXTRACTION.md §9; WO-19). PDC and OpenStates share NO native
so every link here is a REVIEWED PROMOTION of a quarantined candidate from the
disclosure_link_candidates table: a human verifies the PDC candidacy against the
legislator (evidence_url) and commits the pair. No model, no name-matcher, and no
pipeline stage ever writes to this file. Empty entries = no WA money publishes on
any dossier (unlinked is honest; a wrong link is not).
Entry shape: {wa_pdc_person_id, ocd_person, evidence_url, reviewed_on} — all required.
wa_pdc_person_id is PDC's summary-feed person_id ('the preferred id for identifying
a natural person' — their data dictionary); ocd_person must already be in the spine.
